app.title: CIQ Voice Agent
app.footer: CIQ Voice Agent - Demo Web Application

onboarding.title: How to use
onboarding.step3: Wait 5 seconds for face analysis to start
onboarding.step4: Make sure only one face is visible
onboarding.step5: Say "Hi, Who are you?" to start
onboarding.limitation2: Not optimized for mobile/tablet — use a desktop browser
onboarding.limitation4: The agent may go off-topic — you can guide it back
onboarding.limitation5: Some survey questions may be skipped

groundingFiles.title: Grounding files
groundingFiles.description: Files used to ground the answers.
